summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open PR inventory candidates plus hydrated linked context. No GitHub mutations are planned because job mode is plan and comment/close/label actions are blocked. Merge recommendations are withheld where required merge preflight proof is incomplete. Security-sensitive linked issue #79038 and security-sensitive PR #79041 are routed centrally without blocking unrelated non-security PR classification or the executable non-security repair path for #92028 and #77184.
